# nxt-highlightjs documentation

> Angular code highlighting directives with optional line numbers and support for SSR

> Generated by compodoc 2.0.0 at 2026-07-10T19:28:10.092Z, llm-md export.

## Directives

### HighlightAutoDirective

File: `src/lib/highlight-auto.directive.ts`
Selector: `[nxtHighlightAuto]`

Inputs:
- `nxtHighlightAuto: string = undefined` — Code to highlight
- `languages: string[]` — An optional array of language names and aliases restricting detection to only those languages The subset can also be set with configure, but the local parameter overrides the option if set.

Outputs:
- `highlighted: AutoHighlightResult` — Stream that emits when code string is highlighted

Properties:
- `highlightResult: unknown = signal<AutoHighlightResult | undefined>(undefined)` — Highlighted result
- `code: InputSignal<string | undefined>` — Code to highlight
- `highlighted: OutputEmitterRef<HighlightResult | AutoHighlightResult | undefined>` — Stream that emits when code string is highlighted
- `hljs: HighlightJS = inject(HighlightJS)`

Methods:
- `highlightElement(code: string): any`

### HighlightBase

File: `src/lib/highlight-base.directive.ts`

Properties:
- `code: InputSignal<string | undefined>` — Code to highlight
- `highlighted: OutputEmitterRef<HighlightResult | AutoHighlightResult | undefined>` — Stream that emits when code string is highlighted
- `highlightResult: WritableSignal<HighlightResult | AutoHighlightResult | undefined>` — Highlighted result
- `hljs: HighlightJS = inject(HighlightJS)`

Methods:
- `highlightElement(code: string): HighlightResult | AutoHighlightResult | undefined`

### HighlightDirective

File: `src/lib/highlight.directive.ts`
Selector: `[nxtHighlight]`

Inputs:
- `nxtHighlight: string = undefined` — Code to highlight
- `ignoreIllegals: boolean = undefined` — An optional flag, when set to true it forces highlighting to finish even in case of detecting illegal syntax for the language instead of throwing an exception
- `language: string` — The language name highlight only one language

Outputs:
- `highlighted: HighlightResult` — Stream that emits when code string is highlighted

Properties:
- `highlightResult: unknown = signal<HighlightResult | undefined>(undefined)` — Highlighted result
- `code: InputSignal<string | undefined>` — Code to highlight
- `highlighted: OutputEmitterRef<HighlightResult | AutoHighlightResult | undefined>` — Stream that emits when code string is highlighted
- `hljs: HighlightJS = inject(HighlightJS)`

Methods:
- `highlightElement(code: string): any`

### HighlightLineNumbersDirective

File: `line-numbers/src/line-numbers.directive.ts`
Selector: `[nxtHighlight][lineNumbers], [nxtHighlightAuto][lineNumbers]`

Inputs:
- `singleLine: boolean | undefined = this.options?.singleLine`
- `startFrom: number | undefined = this.options?.startFrom`

## Pipes

### GistFilePipe

File: `extras/src/gist.ts`
Pipe name: `gistFile`

Methods:
- `transform(gist?: Gist | null, fileName?: string | null): GistFile | undefined`

## Services / Injectables

### HighlightJS

File: `src/lib/highlight.service.ts`
providedIn: `root`

Properties:
- `hljs: unknown = this.loader.hljs.value`

### HighlightLoader

File: `src/lib/highlight.loader.ts`
providedIn: `root`

Properties:
- `hljs: unknown = resource({ loader: () => this.loadLibrary() .then(async hljs => { if (this.options?.lineNumbersLoader) { const plugin = await this.options.lineNumbersLoader(); …`

Methods:
- `setTheme(path: string): void` — Reload theme styles

### HighlightLoaderStub

File: `src/test-helpers.ts`
providedIn: `root`

Properties:
- `hljs: unknown = resource({ loader: () => this.ready }).asReadonly()`
- `ready: unknown = new Promise<HLJSApi>((resolve) => { (hljs as any).lineNumbersBlock = activateLineNumbers(document) resolve(hljs) })`

## Interfaces

### ChangeStatus

File: `extras/src/gist.model.ts`

Properties:
- `additions: number`
- `deletions: number`
- `total: number`

### Files

File: `extras/src/gist.model.ts`

### Gist

File: `extras/src/gist.model.ts`

Properties:
- `comments: number`
- `comments_url: string`
- `commits_url: string`
- `created_at: Date`
- `description: string`
- `files: Files`
- `forks: any[]`
- `forks_url: string`
- `git_pull_url: string`
- `git_push_url: string`
- `history: History[]`
- `html_url: string`
- `id: string`
- `node_id: string`
- `owner: Owner`
- `public: boolean`
- `truncated: boolean`
- `updated_at: Date`
- `url: string`
- `user?: any`

### GistFile

File: `extras/src/gist.model.ts`

Properties:
- `content: string`
- `filename: string`
- `language: string`
- `raw_url: string`
- `size: number`
- `truncated: boolean`
- `type: string`

### GistOptions

File: `extras/src/gist.model.ts`

Properties:
- `clientId: string`
- `clientSecret: string`

### HighlightJSOptions

File: `src/lib/highlight.model.ts`

Properties:
- `coreLibraryLoader?: function`
- `fullLibraryLoader?: function`
- `highlightOptions?: Partial<HLJSOptions>`
- `languages?: Record<string, () => Promise<LanguageFn>>`
- `lineNumbersLoader?: function`
- `lineNumbersOptions?: LineNumbersOptions`
- `themePath?: string`

### History

File: `extras/src/gist.model.ts`

Properties:
- `change_status: ChangeStatus`
- `committed_at: Date`
- `url: string`
- `user: User`
- `version: string`

### LineNumbersOptions

File: `src/lib/highlight.model.ts`

Description: Full documentation is available here https://highlightjs.readthedocs.io/en/latest/api.html

Properties:
- `singleLine?: boolean`
- `startFrom?: number`

### Owner

File: `extras/src/gist.model.ts`

Properties:
- `avatar_url: string`
- `events_url: string`
- `followers_url: string`
- `following_url: string`
- `gists_url: string`
- `gravatar_id: string`
- `html_url: string`
- `id: number`
- `login: string`
- `node_id: string`
- `organizations_url: string`
- `received_events_url: string`
- `repos_url: string`
- `site_admin: boolean`
- `starred_url: string`
- `subscriptions_url: string`
- `type: string`
- `url: string`

### User

File: `extras/src/gist.model.ts`

Properties:
- `avatar_url: string`
- `events_url: string`
- `followers_url: string`
- `following_url: string`
- `gists_url: string`
- `gravatar_id: string`
- `html_url: string`
- `id: number`
- `login: string`
- `node_id: string`
- `organizations_url: string`
- `received_events_url: string`
- `repos_url: string`
- `site_admin: boolean`
- `starred_url: string`
- `subscriptions_url: string`
- `type: string`
- `url: string`

## Public functions

- `activateLineNumbers(document: Document)`
  Defined in `line-numbers/src/line-numbers-lib.ts`
- `afterTimeout(timeout: number): Promise<void>`
  Defined in `src/test-helpers.ts`
- `fileResource(url, _options = {})` — Code resource by URL
  Defined in `extras/src/code-loader.ts`
- `gistResource(id, options?: Omit)` — Gist resource by id
  Defined in `extras/src/code-loader.ts`
- `provideGistOptions(options: GistOptions): Provider[]`
  Defined in `extras/src/gist.model.ts`
- `provideHighlightOptions(options: HighlightJSOptions)`
  Defined in `src/lib/highlight.model.ts`

## Public variables

- `NXT_HIGHLIGHT_FILE_LOCATION: unknown = new InjectionToken<CodeFileLocation>('NXT_HIGHLIGHT_FILE_LOCATION', { providedIn: 'root', factory: CODE_FILE_LOCATION_FACTORY })` — Injection token used to provide the current location to codeFromUrl pipe. Used to handle server-side rendering and to stub out during unit tests.
  Defined in `extras/src/code-file-location.ts`
